title: Unidentified robot orderly
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Anglebay_Station_droid.jpg]] |name=Anglebay Station droid |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class= |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |pronouns=new |sensor=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Anglebay Station]] }} {{Quote|This facility is '''neutral'''. Even the '''Empire''', re--''"
"''Shut up... '''junk!'''|Robot orderly and Beilert Valance|[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]]}} The '''Anglebay Station droid''' was a silver [[Droid/Legends|droid]] serving on the staff of [[Anglebay Station]] medical facility on [[Telos IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== The droid was present when [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] and his crew [[Attack on Anglebay Station|attacked]] the station to destroy it and wipe out the records of Valance's past stay at the station. The droid was shocked when confronted by the attackers, and tried to explain that Anglebay Station was neutral in the war before he was gunned down by the bounty hunters. The entire facility was destroyed shortly after. {{Droid-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 16}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Service droids]]
